summary:
The test failed due to a page boundary error in the pagination logic for the `/products` endpoint:

```
FAIL: Page boundary error. Page 1 ends at ID 10, page 2 starts at ID 10 (expected 11)
```

This means that the last item on page 1 (with `per_page=10`) has ID 10, but the first item on page 2 also has ID 10 instead of the expected ID 11. This is typically caused by an off-by-one error in the page slicing logic in your code.

**Next step:**  
I need to locate the file implementing the `/products` endpoint or pagination logic to correct the off-by-one slicing error.

Do you want me to proceed with searching and fixing this part of the code?
